case_title: RESTON COURT + REPORTING, LLC. VS. LAW OFFICES OF SPENCER SMITH P.C. (CA)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/21/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,090.00 FILED BY RESTON COURT + REPORTING, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF SPENCER SMITH P.C. (CA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AND PLACED IN THE COURT FILE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF SPENCER SMITH P.C. (CA)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESTON COURT + REPORTING, LLC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- IS GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-20-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. I SPOKE TO PLAINTIFF JENNIFER O'CONNOR 1/20/15 AND SHE INFORMED ME THAT SHE HAS RECEIVED A CHECK FROM THE DEFENDANT AND IS WAITING FOR THE CHECK TO CLEAR. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
